'''harutu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:squareness|squareness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-r-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:squareness|squareness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| harutu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæritith|hæritith]] || [[word:hæritij|hæritij]] || [[word:hæritish|hæritish]] || [[word:hæriti|hæriti]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:harurututh|harurututh]] || [[word:harurutuj|harurutuj]] || [[word:harurutush|harurutush]] || [[word:harurutu|harurutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:harututh|harututh]] || [[word:harutuj|harutuj]] || [[word:harutush|harutush]] || [[word:harutu|harutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:haruftufth|haruftufth]] || [[word:haruftufj|haruftufj]] || [[word:haruftufsh|haruftufsh]] || [[word:haruftuf|haruftuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:harututhu|harututhu]] || [[word:harutuju|harutuju]] || [[word:harutushu|harutushu]] || [[word:harutuku|harutuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:harututh|harututh]] || [[word:harutuj|harutuj]] || [[word:harutush|harutush]] || [[word:harutu|harutu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:harututhul|harututhul]] || [[word:harutujul|harutujul]] || [[word:harutushul|harutushul]] || [[word:harutukul|harutukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:harutuuthuthu|harutuuthuthu]] || [[word:harutuujuju|harutuujuju]] || [[word:harutuushushu|harutuushushu]] || [[word:harutuuku|harutuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:harututhun|harututhun]] || [[word:harutujun|harutujun]] || [[word:harutushun|harutushun]] || [[word:harutukun|harutukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:harututhuoro|harututhuoro]] || [[word:harutujuoro|harutujuoro]] || [[word:harutushuoro|harutushuoro]] || [[word:harutukuoro|harutukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1da9d54}}
